economic_notes: Consolidated subsidiaries: Upper Similkameen Development Corporation and 0628957 BC Ltd. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Stuwix Resources JV (12.5% interest, total revenue $16,958,577) and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation (33.3% interest). Natural resources, logging, and mining operations are significant revenue sources.
notes: Restricted cash of $268,675 comprises CMHC replacement reserve ($124,494) and operating reserve ($144,181). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Stuwix Resources JV and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation. Capital lease obligations of $1,532,922 exist in addition to long-term debt. Large deferred revenue balance of $4,930,800 relates primarily to ISC capital projects and Province of BC transfers. Adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 prospectively. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($2,908,979) + other government revenue from segments ($4,100,382) = $7,009,361. expenses_housing includes Housing ($804,374) and CMHC Social Housing ($82,249). expenses_infrastructure includes Operations and Maintenance ($320,824) and Community Infrastructure ($59,829). No schedule of remuneration was included in the provided financial statement text.
